title: stipa annua
intro: Stipa annua, also known as Annual Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Stipa annua include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent the formation of blood clots. Stipa annua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
